faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Pulse.ai
faq.q1: Is it really free to start?
faq.a1: Yes! You get a full overview of your nutrition plan and a free training session. Then, 3 plans are available: Weekly (€6.99/wk), Monthly (€14.99/mo with 7-day trial) or Yearly (€149.99/yr with 7-day trial).
faq.q2: I'm a beginner, will it work for me?
faq.a2: Absolutely! Pulse.ai adapts to all levels, from complete beginners to advanced athletes. Instructions are clear, educational and exercises are shown on video.
faq.a3: Our AI analyzes your answers (age, weight, goal, level, available equipment, constraints...) and creates a 100% custom plan in seconds. It then automatically adjusts based on your weekly feedback.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime, directly from your dashboard in 1 click. No questions asked, no hidden fees.
faq.a5: No equipment required! Pulse.ai adapts to what you have: bodyweight only, dumbbells, barbell, gym machines... You select your equipment during setup.
faq.a6: We guarantee visible results in 4 weeks if you follow your plan at least 80%. Otherwise, you get a full refund, no questions asked.
faq.a7: Yes! Complete dashboard with session history, weight/measurement evolution, progress graphs and automatic plan adjustments.
faq.a8: Yes! Our AI coaches Alex and Julie are available 24/7 to guide you. For human support, we respond within 48h (business days) at general@pulse-ai.app.
